name: PITECO S.p.A.
summary: PITECO S.p.A. engages in the design, development, and implementation of solutions for treasury, finance, and financial planning management worldwide. The company offers PITECO EVO, a platform designed to manage cash management, payment factory, financial planning, global liquidity management, and supply chain finance; PITECO CBC, a corporate banking communication platform that manages automation of the authorization workflows; and PITECO FRM that supports corporate financial risk management processes in compliance with the international accounting codes and observing financial risk exposures. It also provides MATCH.IT, a solution to analyze and match complex data; and PITECO AT.PRO, an information system for the back and middle office management of securities portfolio. In addition, the company offers consultancy and assistance services, including consultancy tailored to client needs, customer care, software customizing, customizable product releases, and application management. It serves various customers in automation and paper, automotive, chemical and pharmaceutical, healthcare, construction and tile, consumer goods, fashion, finance and insurance, food, logistics and travelling, mechanics and steel, media, retail, services, telecom, utilities, and oil and gas industries. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Milan, Italy. PITECO S.p.A. is a subsidiary of DEDAGROUP spa.
